title: danthonia domingensis subsp. obtorta
intro: Danthonia domingensis subsp. obtorta is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, specifically a subspecies of the Danthonia domingensis species. The medicinal properties of Danthonia domingensis subsp. obtorta include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Danthonia domingensis subsp. obtorta can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine practices.
